title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle: Flying Lessons Set with 6 Collectible Minifigures incl. Draco Malfoy & Professor McGonagall, Role Play Toy for Wizarding World Fans, 9+ Year Old Boys & Girls, 76447
features: Wizarding World playset – Kids can play out Quidditch and Transfiguration classes with this LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle: Flying Lessons set
6 LEGO Harry Potter character minifigures – Harry Potter, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Professor McGonagall, Madam Hooch and Oliver Wood
Magical toy playset – The foldout building has Quidditch equipment room, Transfiguration classroom, McGonagall’s office, trophy room and more
2 of 14 collectible Hogwarts portraits – This Harry Potter toy for 9+ year old boys and girls includes 2 of 14 random Hogwarts portrait elements
Gift idea for kids – This magical toy set is a fun Harry Potter gift for 9+ year old boys, girls and fans of Harry Potter and Wizarding World toys
Fun way to build – LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure, where they can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track progress and save sets
Harry Potter collection – This playset is part of a collection of modular sets (sold separately) that connect to create the detailed LEGO brick-built Hogwarts Castle scene
description: From the manufacturer Classroom playset Recreate spellbinding lessons at Hogwarts Castle Play out Quidditch matches and Transfiguration classes from Harry Potter and the Philosopher’s Stone with this collectible building set. This magical toy makes a fantastic LEGO Harry Potter gift for kids aged 9 and over. Unique LEGO Harry Potter set Made for creative play This set features a section of Hogwarts Castle that folds out for easy play and includes the Quidditch equipment room, Transfiguration classroom, Professor McGonagall’s office and the trophy room. Previous page Popular characters This set includes LEGO Harry Potter minifigures: Harry Potter, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Professor McGonagall, Madam Hooch and Oliver Wood. Pull-out rooms The Quidditch equipment room and Transfiguration classroom pull out for easy access. Magical adventures Fun Transfiguration and broom-flying functions inspire creative play. Trophy room See 2 of 14 collectible Hogwarts portraits on display in the trophy room. Extra classes! The Hogwarts Castle: Charms Class set (76442, sold separately) can be connected to this model to expand the play possibilities. Next page LEGO Builder 3D building instructions Add a little extra magic to your creative experience with the intuitive LEGO Builder app, where you can zoom in and rotate a 3D digital version of your model as you build, track your progress and save sets. Harry Potter collectible Explore the buildable Hogwarts Castle collection This building kit is part of a collection of modular sets (sold separately) that connect to create the most detailed LEGO brick-built Hogwarts Castle scene yet. Previous page Hogwarts Castle Owlery Build the first-ever LEGO model of the Hogwarts Castle Owlery and role-play Harry Potter stories with this enchanting toy playset for kids. Hogwarts Castle: Potions Class Give your young witch, wizard or Muggle a spellbinding playtime experience with a buildable classroom that’s packed with authentic accessories. Hogwarts Castle: The Great Hall Bring magical Harry Potter stories to life with the largest LEGO brick recreation to date of the Great Hall, plus a courtyard, dungeon and 11 minifigures. Hogwarts Castle: Duelling Club This Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets toy lets kids role-play as Harry Potter learning spellbinding skills and duelling with Draco Malfoy. Hogwarts Castle: Charms Class Join Hermione Granger and Ron Weasley in a charms class with this enchanting kids’ playset, featuring a Wingardium Leviosa feather-levitation function. Next page

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
